title: cyphia corylifolia
intro: Cyphia corylifolia, also known as the toothache plant, is a perennial herb native to tropical regions of Asia. It possesses medicinal properties, including analgesic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat toothaches and other minor pains. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Cyphia corylifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal preparations.
